title: Capital One (COF)Intrinsic Value
description: We ran a full discounted cash flow on Capital One. One number. Every assumption disclosed. Here's what COF is really worth.

discountRate.title: Discount Rate (WACC)
discountRate.rationale:
">
Derived from the 3-year historical revenue CAGR. Capped at logical bounds to prevent overextrapolation of near-term cycles in the financial sector.

terminalGrowth.title: Terminal Growth Rate
terminalGrowth.rationale:
">
A long-term mature growth rate constrained by typical macroeconomic GDP growth and inflation expectations, specifically set to 2.5%.

verdictFooter: Based on FY2025 actuals. Data via S&P Global (Mar 18, 2026).
